sessions.title: UI Agent 7
sessions.prompt: Improve mobile responsiveness of side navigation and data table dashboards. Loop: 1) Check CSS media queries, 2) Critique mobile layout, 3) Refactor grid styles.

gitPatch.suggestedCommitMessage:
fix(dashboard): Improve mobile responsiveness for stats, tables, and nav

- Refactored `.stats-grid` in `@media (max-width: 768px)` to default to 1 column (`grid-template-columns: 1fr;`) for better visibility.
- Prevented wrapping in `.table td, .table th` using `white-space: nowrap;` to ensure `.table-responsive` allows horizontal scrolling.
- Increased padding on `.nav-item` within `@media (max-width: 768px)` to improve mobile touch targets.
- Fixed a duplicated CSS property and unused import in CampaignPlannerPage.

pullRequest.title: Improve Mobile Responsiveness (Stats, Tables, Navigation)
pullRequest.description:
This PR improves the mobile view of the dashboard by:

1. Modifying the `stats-grid` so cards flow gracefully in a single column on mobile screens.
2. Preventing text wrap in data tables to allow horizontal scrolling, so it doesn't compress and look awkward on smaller devices.
3. Increasing the padding in the mobile sidebar `.nav-item` links for better touchability.
4. Cleaned up an unused import and duplicated style object property in CampaignPlannerPage to make the build pass.

---
